name: Chocolate Frosting- Sugar Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine skim milk, vanilla, and Dream Whip in a bowl.
2. Beat until stiff peaks form.
3. Gradually add the sugar-free chocolate pudding mix.
4. Continue beating until light and fluffy.
5. If the mixture is too thick, add more skim milk, one tablespoon at a time.
6. Use as frosting on low-fat cupcakes (1 T per cupcake).
7. Can also be used to frost cakes or brownies (1 T = 9 calories, 0 cholesterol).
